outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/programs/tlf_responder.R
+++ b/programs/tlf_responder.R
@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 # Bug 1: Wrong responder definition: should be >=50% reduction from baseline, not >=30%
-responder <- ifelse(change >= 30, 1, 0)
+responder <- ifelse(change >= 50, 1, 0)
 
 # Bug 2: Wrong statistical test: should be Fisher's exact test, not chi-squared
-chi_test <- chisq.test(table(trt, responder))
+fish_test <- fisher.test(table(trt, responder))
 
 # Bug 3: Wrong denominator: should be N in each treatment group, not total N
-denom <- rep(n_total, 2)
+denom <- as.vector(table(trt))
 
 # Bug 4: Missing not excluded: need to filter out subjects with missing baseline or post-baseline
-data <- data[!is.na(baseline) & !is.na(post), ]
+data <- data[!is.na(baseline) & !is.na(post) & !is.na(exclude_flag), ]
 
 # Also ensure the exclusion flag is properly handled
-data <- data[data$exclude_flag != "Y", ]
+data <- data[is.na(data$exclude_flag) | data$exclude_flag != "Y", ]
